from typing import List, Set

def get_unique_tags(posts: List[dict]) -> List[str]:
    tags: Set[str] = set()
    for post in posts:
        for tag in post.get("tags", []):
            tags.add(tag)
    return list(tags)

def find_common_categories(items_a: List[dict], items_b: List[dict]) -> List[str]:
    cats_a = {item["category"] for item in items_a}
    cats_b = {item["category"] for item in items_b}
    common = cats_a & cats_b
    return list(common)

def get_all_permissions(users: List[dict]) -> List[str]:
    perms: Set[str] = set()
    for user in users:
        perms.update(user.get("permissions", []))
    return list(perms)

def collect_unique_emails(orders: List[dict]) -> List[str]:
    emails = set()
    for order in orders:
        emails.add(order["customer_email"])
    return list(emails)
